name: Surrogate-1 Workflow
description: This workflow processes and enriches public datasets using a distributed architecture.

steps.name: Fetch Dataset
steps.description: Fetches the public dataset list from the source.

parameters.name: dataset_url
parameters.description: The endpoint URL to fetch the dataset list from.

parameters.name: shard_id
parameters.description: Optional specific shard ID to filter the fetch.

steps.name: Normalize Data
steps.description: Normalizes the fetched data per the internal schema.

parameters.name: schema_path
parameters.description: Path to the JSON schema file.

steps.name: Deduplicate
steps.description: Deduplicates data using the central md5 hash store.

parameters.name: hash_store_path
parameters.description: Path to the persistent hash store.

steps.name: Upload Data
steps.description: Uploads the processed data to the dataset repository.
